Bash(node -e "const d=require\(String.raw\\`D:\\Projects\\Personal Website\\3d-city\\public\\data\\manhattan\\tile_-1_-1.json\\`\); const b=d.buildings[0]; console.log\('id:', b.id\); console.log\('height:', b.height\); console.log\('footprint[0]:', b.footprint[0]\); console.log\('center:', b.center\); console.log\('total buildings:', d.buildings.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const m=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('tiles count:', m.tiles.length\); console.log\('first tile:', JSON.stringify\(m.tiles[0]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./public/data/manhattan/manifest.json'\); console.log\('tiles:', m.tiles.length\); const t=m.tiles[0]; console.log\('first tile:', JSON.stringify\(t\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./public/data/manhattan/tile_-5_12.json'\); console.log\('buildings:', t.buildings.length\); console.log\('first building:', JSON.stringify\(t.buildings[0]\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175,5176,5177,5178 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" })
